parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Seer and asserts that there are no werewolves in play because he saw two werewolf cards in the center. This is a common bluff used by werewolves to discourage the village from voting. Furthermore, Justin's insistence on a 'vote left' rule and his attempt to control the discussion make him the most suspicious player. While Paul's claims are contradictory, they are more characteristic of a Tanner or a confused player than a werewolf.
